items.title: ScaleSwap: A Scalable OS Swap System for All-Flash Swap Arrays.
items.abstract: This paper presents a scalable OS swap system, ScaleSwap, designed to enhance core and SSD scalability on all-flash swap arrays. Specifically, ScaleSwap first enables a one-to-one swap model where each core exclusively manages its own swap resources, enabling core-centric swap in/out operations. Second, ScaleSwap devises opportunistic inter-core swap assistance, allowing each core to delegate swap metadata access to other cores as needed. Finally, ScaleSwap adopts core-affinity page and LRU management to mitigate LRU lock contention during swap in/out operations. We implement ScaleSwap in the Linux kernel and evaluate its performance on a 128-core machine with an all-flash swap array comprising eight NVMe SSDs. Our evaluation shows that ScaleSwap achieves up to 3.4× higher throughput and up to 11.5× lower average latency than the Linux swap system. Furthermore, ScaleSwap outperforms two prior systems, TMO and ExtMEM, by up to 64% and 5×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种可扩展的操作系统交换系统 ScaleSwap，旨在增强全闪存交换阵列上的核心和 SSD 可扩展性。具体来说，ScaleSwap 首先启用一对一的交换模型，其中每个核心专门管理自己的交换资源，从而实现以核心为中心的换入/换出操作。其次，ScaleSwap 设计了机会性的核心间交换辅助，允许每个核心根据需要将交换元数据访问权限委托给其他核心。最后，ScaleSwap 采用核心亲和性页面和 LRU 管理来缓解换入/换出操作期间的 LRU 锁争用。我们在 Linux 内核中实现了 ScaleSwap，并在配备由 8 个 NVMe SSD 组成的全闪存交换阵列的 128 核机器上评估其性能。我们的评估表明，与 Linux 交换系统相比，ScaleSwap 的吞吐量提高了 3.4 倍，平均延迟降低了 11.5 倍。此外，ScaleSwap 的性能比之前的两个系统 TMO 和 ExtMEM 分别高出 64% 和 5 倍。

items.title: Xerxes: Extensive Exploration of Scalable Hardware Systems with CXL-Based Simulation Framework.
items.abstract: Compute Express Link (CXL) is an emerging industry standard that offers high-performance cache-coherent interconnects to heterogeneous devices, including host CPUs, computation accelerators, and memory devices. It aims to support high system scalability, peer-to-peer communication, and high-speed data transmission. To this end, the latest version of the CXL protocol introduces several new features, including port-based routing, device-managed coherence, and PCIe 6.0 support. However, the absence of CXL hardware and the methodological limitations of existing simulators hinder the exploration of these new architectures. To bridge this gap, we propose Xerxes , a novel simulation framework designed from the ground up to faithfully model the emerging features in the latest CXL protocol. It employs a dedicated interconnect layer to support interconnection within diverse system topologies. It also implements important components to conduct specific functions required by these features. Utilizing Xerxes, we comprehensively explore multiple aspects of CXL systems, including system topologies, device-managed coherences, and impacts of PCIe characteristics, and derive key observations that can inspire new designs of high-performance CXL systems. The codes of Xerxes are open-sourced and available at https://github.com/ChaseLab-PKU/Xerxes .
items.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link (CXL) 是一种新兴的行业标准，为异构设备（包括主机 CPU、计算加速器和内存设备）提供高性能缓存一致性互连。它旨在支持高系统可扩展性、点对点通信和高速数据传输。为此，最新版本的 CXL 协议引入了多项新功能，包括基于端口的路由、设备管理一致性和 PCIe 6.0 支持。然而，CXL 硬件的缺乏以及现有模拟器的方法限制阻碍了对这些新架构的探索。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 Xerxes，这是一种从头开始设计的新型模拟框架，可以忠实地模拟最新 CXL 协议中的新兴功能。它采用专用互连层来支持不同系统拓扑内的互连。它还实现了重要的组件来执行这些功能所需的特定功能。利用 Xerxes，我们全面探索 CXL 系统的多个方面，包括系统拓扑、设备管理的一致性和 PCIe 特性的影响，并得出可以激发高性能 CXL 系统新设计的关键观察结果。 Xerxes 的代码是开源的，可在 https://github.com/ChaseLab-PKU/Xerxes 获取。

items.title: ACOS: Apple's Geo-Distributed Object Store at Exabyte Scale.
items.abstract: Over the last two decades, with the advent of mobile computing and Internet streaming, Apple has expanded its user base and services significantly. With this growth, we have seen an increased volume and diversity of data storage, ranging from backups, personal photos and videos, to music libraries, TV shows, and live streaming. In this paper, we present ACOS, Apple's object store designed to meet the specific requirements of user-facing and internal services, by accommodating a wide range of content and access patterns. ACOS has been in production for over a decade, storing several exabytes of objects and serving billions of requests per day. With its geo-replicated architecture using both local and regional replication mechanisms, ACOS is cost-efficient and highly scalable, available, and durable. The evaluation of our production deployment shows its throughput and latency performance as well as its resilience to hardware and data center failures. This paper presents the design and evolution of ACOS, evaluates its performance in production, and demonstrates its capacity to scale and support Apple's current storage needs and future growth. Note: This paper's title and abstract have been updated per the errata slip published in the conference proceedings.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年里，随着移动计算和互联网流媒体的出现，苹果公司显着扩大了其用户群和服务。随着这种增长，我们看到数据存储的数量和多样性不断增加，从备份、个人照片和视频到音乐库、电视节目和直播。在本文中，我们介绍了 ACOS，Apple 的对象存储，旨在通过容纳广泛的内容和访问模式来满足面向用户和内部服务的特定要求。 ACOS 已投入生产十多年，存储数艾字节的对象并每天处理数十亿个请求。凭借使用本地和区域复制机制的异地复制架构，ACOS 具有成本效益且高度可扩展、可用且持久。对我们的生产部署的评估显示了其吞吐量和延迟性能以及对硬件和数据中心故障的恢复能力。本文介绍了 ACOS 的设计和演变，评估了其生产性能，并展示了其扩展和支持 Apple 当前存储需求和未来增长的能力。注：本文的标题和摘要已根据会议记录中发布的勘误表进行了更新。

items.title: Discard-Based Garbage Collection for Distributed Log-Structured Storage Systems in ByteDance.
items.abstract: ByteStore is a distributed append-only storage system that serves as the foundational storage layer of the ByteDance infrastructure. Initially, storage services on ByteStore use compaction for garbage collection (GC). Additional writes induced by compaction and the SSD space occupied by stale data result in millions of dollars in extra Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) per month. Aggressive compaction releases the SSD space, but at the cost of more write operations and faster SSD wear, thus failing to reduce TCO. Based on our analysis of the traces from the block storage service (ByteDrive) deployed on ByteStore, we propose DisCoGC, a Discard-and-Compaction combined Garbage Collection scheme, which employs a discard mechanism to reclaim the space occupied by stale data without moving valid data. Production cluster metrics monitor and offline experiments demonstrate that DisCoGC achieves approximately 20% reduction in TCO, without sacrificing performance.
items.abstract_zh: ByteStore是一个分布式仅追加存储系统，作为字节跳动基础设施的基础存储层。最初，ByteStore 上的存储服务使用压缩来进行垃圾收集 (GC)。压缩引起的额外写入以及过时数据占用的 SSD 空间会导致每月数百万美元的额外总拥有成本 (TCO)。激进的压缩释放了SSD空间，但代价是更多的写入操作和更快的SSD磨损，从而无法降低TCO。基于对部署在 ByteStore 上的块存储服务（ByteDrive）的跟踪分析，我们提出了 DisCoGC，一种丢弃和压缩相结合的垃圾收集方案，它采用丢弃机制来回收陈旧数据占用的空间，而不移动有效数据。生产集群指标监控和离线实验表明，DisCoGC 在不牺牲性能的情况下实现了 TCO 约 20% 的降低。

items.title: How Soon is Now? Preloading Images for Virtual Disks with ThinkAhead.
items.abstract: Efficient cloud computing relies on high-performance Elastic Block Storage (EBS) services, where virtual disk (VD) image loading significantly affects user experience. While the commonly used "lazy loading" approach reduces cold-start time from minutes to sub-seconds, our trace analysis of around 160,000 real-world image loading events in Alibaba EBS reveals that slow I/Os during initial block access constitute the primary performance bottleneck, accounting for 40% of all slow I/Os. We propose ThinkAhead, a data-driven image preloading system for VDs. ThinkAhead comprises various techniques to predict efficient block preloading sequences for images with historical traces based on runtime conditions and address corner cases with limited or no historical traces. Trace-driven simulation and cluster experiments show that ThinkAhead improves the data block hit rate by up to 7.27× and reduces tail waiting time by up to 98.7% across various image types compared to lazy loading and various baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 高效的云计算依赖于高性能的弹性块存储（EBS）服务，其中虚拟磁盘（VD）镜像加载显着影响用户体验。虽然常用的“延迟加载”方法将冷启动时间从几分钟缩短到亚秒级，但我们对阿里巴巴 EBS 中约 160,000 个实际图像加载事件的跟踪分析表明，初始块访问期间的慢 I/O 构成了主要的性能瓶颈，占所有慢 I/O 的 40%。我们提出了 ThinkAhead，一种用于 VD 的数据驱动图像预加载系统。 ThinkAhead 包含各种技术，可根据运行时条件预测具有历史痕迹的图像的有效块预加载序列，并解决历史痕迹有限或没有历史痕迹的极端情况。跟踪驱动的仿真和集群实验表明，与延迟加载和各种基线相比，ThinkAhead 在各种图像类型上将数据块命中率提高了高达 7.27 倍，并将尾部等待时间减少了高达 98.7%。

items.title: LESS is More for I/O-Efficient Repairs in Erasure-Coded Storage.
items.abstract: I/O efficiency is critical for erasure-coded repair performance in modern distributed storage. We propose LESS, a family of repair-friendly erasure code constructions that reduces both the amount of data accessed and the number of I/O seeks in single-block repairs, while ensuring balanced reductions across blocks. LESS layers multiple extended sub-stripes formed by widely deployed Reed-Solomon coding, and is configurable to balance the trade-off between the amount of data accessed and I/O seeks. Evaluation shows that LESS on HDFS reduces both single-block repair and full-node recovery times compared to state-of-the-art I/O-optimal erasure codes.
items.abstract_zh: I/O 效率对于现代分布式存储中的纠删码修复性能至关重要。我们提出了 LESS，这是一系列易于修复的纠删码结构，可减少单块修复中访问的数据量和 I/O 查找次数，同时确保跨块的平衡减少。 LESS 对由广泛部署的 Reed-Solomon 编码形成的多个扩展子带进行分层，并且可配置以平衡访问的数据量和 I/O 查找之间的权衡。评估表明，与最先进的 I/O 最佳擦除代码相比，HDFS 上的 LESS 减少了单块修复和全节点恢复时间。

items.title: Preparation Meets Opportunity: Enhancing Data Preprocessing for ML Training With Seneca.
items.abstract: Input data preprocessing is a common bottleneck when concurrently training multimedia machine learning (ML) models in modern systems. To alleviate these bottlenecks and reduce the training time for concurrent jobs, we present Seneca, a data loading system that optimizes cache partitioning and data sampling for the data storage and ingestion (DSI) pipeline. The design of Seneca contains two key techniques. First, Seneca uses a performance model for the data pipeline to optimally partition the cache for three different forms of data (encoded, decoded, and augmented). Second, Seneca opportunistically serves cached data over uncached ones during random batch sampling so that concurrent jobs benefit from each other. We implement Seneca by modifying PyTorch and demonstrate its effectiveness by comparing it against several state-of-the-art caching systems for DNN training. Seneca reduces the makespan by 45.23% compared to PyTorch and increases data processing throughput by up to 3.45× compared to the next best dataloader.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代系统中同时训练多媒体机器学习 (ML) 模型时，输入数据预处理是一个常见的瓶颈。为了缓解这些瓶颈并减少并发作业的训练时间，我们推出了 Seneca，这是一种数据加载系统，可优化数据存储和摄取 (DSI) 管道的缓存分区和数据采样。 Seneca 的设计包含两个关键技术。首先，Seneca 使用数据管道的性能模型来针对三种不同形式的数据（编码、解码和增强）对缓存进行最佳分区。其次，Seneca 在随机批量采样期间机会性地提供缓存数据而不是未缓存数据，以便并发作业相互受益。我们通过修改 PyTorch 来实现 Seneca，并通过将其与用于 DNN 训练的几种最先进的缓存系统进行比较来证明其有效性。与 PyTorch 相比，Seneca 将完工时间缩短了 45.23%，并且与次佳数据加载器相比，数据处理吞吐量提高了 3.45 倍。

items.title: OdinANN: Direct Insert for Consistently Stable Performance in Billion-Scale Graph-Based Vector Search.
items.abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) is widely used in various scenarios. For billion-scale ANNS, on-disk graph-based indexes, which organize the vectors as a graph and store them on disk, are favored for their performance and cost-efficiency. However, existing indexes can not maintain a stable search performance while inserting new vectors. In this paper, we propose to use direct insert, which directly inserts vectors into the on-disk index, rather than buffering them in memory and merging them to disk in batches like existing systems. This approach can even out the interference of insert with frontend search, thus stabilizing the performance. We evaluate direct insert by integrating it into a billion-scale graph-based ANNS index named OdinANN. With a fixed insert rate, OdinANN outperforms state-of-the-art ANNS indexes in search latency and throughput, and it consistently shows stable performance in billion-scale vector datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）广泛应用于各种场景。对于数十亿规模的 ANNS，基于磁盘图的索引（将向量组织为图并将其存储在磁盘上）因其性能和成本效率而受到青睐。然而，现有索引在插入新向量时无法保持稳定的搜索性能。在本文中，我们建议使用直接插入，即直接将向量插入到磁盘索引中，而不是像现有系统那样将它们缓冲在内存中并批量合并到磁盘。这种方式可以消除插入对前端搜索的干扰，从而稳定性能。我们通过将直接插入集成到名为 OdinANN 的基于十亿级图的 ANNS 索引来评估直接插入。凭借固定的插入率，OdinANN 在搜索延迟和吞吐量方面优于最先进的 ANNS 索引，并且在十亿规模的向量数据集中始终表现出稳定的性能。

items.title: Advancing Data Integrity in Linux.
items.abstract: Standalone hardware-only or software-only methods fail to provide comprehensive coverage in detecting data corruption. End-to-end data protection (E2EDP) addresses this by carrying per-block protection information (PI) throughout the I/O stack, from the application through the system software to the storage device. Although devices have supported PI for more than a decade, Linux remains incomplete in its support and utilization of these capabilities. This paper closes two fundamental gaps in the mainline Linux kernel and introduces a PI-aware filesystem design with implementation and evaluation. First, we add a new io_uring interface that allows applications to exchange integrity metadata alongside the data. Second, we add flexible PI placement in Linux’s block-integrity enabling support for a device configuration that was otherwise rejected. Finally, we introduce Filesystem Protection Information (FS-PI) , a PI-aware design direction in which filesystems generate and verify integrity metadata directly while leveraging PI-capable hardware. We implement FS-PI in two major filesystems: in XFS , FS-PI introduces native data checksumming, extending data-integrity guarantees for the first time; in BTRFS , FS-PI replaces the checksum tree with a lightweight path that reduces metadata traffic, write amplification, and device wear. We evaluated the cost and gains of FS-PI in BTRFS and XFS. The evaluation shows that FS-PI improves BTRFS performance by 26%, reduces host CPU utilization by 58%, and reduces device writes by 52%, extending SSD lifetime by 23%.
items.abstract_zh: 独立的纯硬件或纯软件方法无法全面覆盖检测数据损坏。端到端数据保护 (E2EDP) 通过在整个 I/O 堆栈（从应用程序到系统软件到存储设备）中携带每块保护信息 (PI) 来解决这个问题。尽管设备支持 PI 已经有十多年了，但 Linux 在支持和利用这些功能方面仍然不完善。本文弥补了主线 Linux 内核中的两个基本差距，并介绍了 PI 感知文件系统的设计及其实现和评估。首先，我们添加一个新的 io_uring 接口，允许应用程序与数据一起交换完整性元数据。其次，我们在 Linux 的块完整性中添加了灵活的 PI 放置，从而支持否则会被拒绝的设备配置。最后，我们介绍文件系统保护信息 (FS-PI)，这是一种 PI 感知设计方向，其中文件系统直接生成和验证完整性元数据，同时利用支持 PI 的硬件。我们在两个主要文件系统中实现 FS-PI：在 XFS 中，FS-PI 引入了本机数据校验和，首次扩展了数据完整性保证；在 BTRFS 中，FS-PI 用轻量级路径替换了校验和树，从而减少了元数据流量、写入放大和设备磨损。我们评估了 BTRFS 和 XFS 中 FS-PI 的成本和收益。评估结果显示，FS-PI将BTRFS性能提升26%，主机CPU利用率降低58%，设备写入减少52%，SSD寿命延长23%。

items.title: Fast Cloud Storage for AI Jobs via Grouped I/O API with Transparent Read/Write Optimizations.
items.abstract: The emergence of AI workloads has placed rigorous bandwidth requirements on cloud storage, which are challenging to meet due to inherent hardware restrictions in cost-efficient disaggregated storage architectures, as well as the non-triviality of implementing application-tailored optimizations. This paper presents AITURBO, a cloud storage system for AI jobs with high bandwidth demands. AITURBO first utilizes the high-bandwidth compute fabric between accelerators to meet AI applications’ bandwidth demands without incurring additional storage cost. AITURBO further introduces a simple yet powerful grouped I/O API that allows AITURBO to automatically derive optimized read and write plans at the storage layer. These plans enable optimizations that are comparable or better than application-level ones, because they capture common I/O patterns in AI workloads and have a holistic view from the storage layer’s perspective. Under common AI workloads such as checkpoint reads and writes and KV-cache reads, AITURBO achieves comparable or better performance than state-of-the-art systems, with and without application-level optimizations, including systems such as Megatron, Gemini, and Mooncake, typically with minimal application-level code changes. AITURBO has been deployed in training jobs in HUAWEI’s production cloud to support efficient training workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能工作负载的出现对云存储提出了严格的带宽要求，由于经济高效的分类存储架构中固有的硬件限制，以及实施应用程序定制优化的复杂性，满足这些要求具有挑战性。本文介绍了AITURBO，一种用于具有高带宽需求的人工智能作业的云存储系统。 AITURBO首先利用加速器之间的高带宽计算结构来满足AI应用程序的带宽需求，而不会产生额外的存储成本。 AITURBO还引入了简单而强大的分组I/O API，允许AITURBO自动导出存储层的优化读写计划。这些计划可实现与应用程序级优化相当或更好的优化，因为它们捕获人工智能工作负载中的常见 I/O 模式，并从存储层的角度提供整体视图。在常见的人工智能工作负载（例如检查点读写和 KV 缓存读取）下，无论是否进行应用程序级优化，AITURBO 都能实现与最先进的系统相当或更好的性能，包括 Megatron、Gemini 和 Mooncake 等系统，通常只需进行最少的应用程序级代码更改。 AITURBO已部署在华为生产云的训练作业中，支持高效的训练工作量。

items.title: PolarStore: High-Performance Data Compression for Large-Scale Cloud-Native Databases.
items.abstract: In recent years, resource elasticity and cost optimization have become essential for RDBMSs. While cloud-native RDBMSs provide elastic computing resources via disaggregated computing and storage, storage costs remain a critical user concern. Consequently, data compression emerges as an effective strategy to reduce storage costs. However, existing compression approaches in RDBMSs present a stark trade-off: software-based approaches incur significant performance overheads, while hardware-based alternatives lack the flexibility required for diverse database workloads. In this paper, we present PolarStore, a compressed shared storage system for cloud-native RDBMSs. PolarStore employs a dual-layer compression mechanism that combines in-storage compression in PolarCSD hardware with lightweight compression in software. This design leverages the strengths of both approaches. PolarStore also incorporates database-oriented optimizations to maintain high performance on critical I/O paths. Drawing from large-scale deployment experiences, we also introduce hardware improvements for PolarCSD to ensure host-level stability and propose a compression-aware scheduling scheme to improve cluster-level space efficiency. PolarStore is currently deployed on thousands of storage servers within PolarDB, managing over 100 PB of data. It achieves a compression ratio of 3.55 and reduces storage costs by approximately 60%. Remarkably, these savings are achieved while maintaining performance comparable to uncompressed clusters.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，资源弹性和成本优化对于 RDBMS 至关重要。虽然云原生 RDBMS 通过分解计算和存储提供弹性计算资源，但存储成本仍然是用户关注的一个关键问题。因此，数据压缩成为降低存储成本的有效策略。然而，RDBMS 中现有的压缩方法存在明显的权衡：基于软件的方法会产生巨大的性能开销，而基于硬件的替代方案缺乏不同数据库工作负载所需的灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了 PolarStore，一种用于云原生 RDBMS 的压缩共享存储系统。 PolarStore 采用双层压缩机制，将 PolarCSD 硬件中的存储内压缩与软件中的轻量级压缩相结合。该设计利用了两种方法的优点。 PolarStore 还结合了面向数据库的优化，以在关键 I/O 路径上保持高性能。借鉴大规模部署经验，我们还对PolarCSD进行了硬件改进，以确保主机级稳定性，并提出压缩感知调度方案以提高集群级空间效率。 PolarStore目前部署在PolarDB内的数千台存储服务器上，管理着超过100PB的数据。它实现了3.55的压缩比，并降低了约60%的存储成本。值得注意的是，在保持与未压缩集群相当的性能的同时，还实现了这些节省。

items.title: Bidaw: Enhancing Key-Value Caching for Interactive LLM Serving via Bidirectional Computation-Storage Awareness.
items.abstract: In interactive LLM serving, historical key–value tensors (KVs) of multi-round conversations are often cached in a two-tier storage system consisting of host memory and SSDs, which provides large capacity at low cost. However, loading KVs from two-tier storage in existing approaches increases serving latency by up to 3.8× and decreases throughput by up to 2.0× compared to an ideal large-memory setting on our interactive conversation workload. This inefficiency arises from poor coordination between compute engine and two-tier storage. This paper proposes Bidaw, an efficient KV caching approach with two-tier storage that enables bidirectional awareness between compute and storage . Bidaw introduces two key mechanisms. First, the compute engine schedules requests with KV-loading latency awareness by separating requests whose KVs reside in different storage layers and reordering them by KV size to reduce blocking. Second, the storage system improves host memory hit rates by leveraging LLM-generated responses to predict user access patterns during KV eviction. For further optimization, Bidaw balances storage footprint against computational savings by selectively caching storage-efficient history tensors. Experiments on our interactive conversation workload and a public multi-round conversation workload of interactive LLM serving show that Bidaw reduces response latency by up to 3.58× and improves throughput by up to 1.83× over state-of-the-art approaches, approaching the theoretical upper bound achieved when all KVs reside entirely in host memory.
items.abstract_zh: 在交互式LLM服务中，多轮对话的历史键值张量（KV）通常缓存在由主机内存和SSD组成的两层存储系统中，该系统以低成本提供大容量。然而，与交互式对话工作负载上的理想大内存设置相比，现有方法中从两层存储加载 KV 会使服务延迟增加高达 3.8 倍，并将吞吐量降低高达 2.0 倍。这种低效率是由于计算引擎和两层存储之间的协调不良造成的。本文提出了 Bidaw，一种高效的 KV 缓存方法，具有两层存储，可实现计算和存储之间的双向感知。 Bidaw 引入了两个关键机制。首先，计算引擎通过分离 KV 驻留在不同存储层的请求并按 KV 大小重新排序来减少阻塞，从而通过 KV 加载延迟感知来调度请求。其次，存储系统利用 LLM 生成的响应来预测 KV 驱逐期间的用户访问模式，从而提高主机内存命中率。为了进一步优化，Bidaw 通过有选择地缓存存储高效的历史张量来平衡存储占用与计算节省。对我们的交互式会话工作负载和交互式 LLM 服务的公共多轮会话工作负载的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Bidaw 将响应延迟降低了 3.58 倍，并将吞吐量提高了 1.83 倍，接近所有 KV 完全驻留在主机内存中时实现的理论上限。

items.title: Towards Condensed and Efficient Read-Only File System via Sort-Enhanced Compression.
items.abstract: Read-only compressed file systems have become increasingly popular in space-sensitive scenarios, such as IoT and Docker containers. To construct condensed images, they divide the data into blocks (e.g., 1 MB) and compress blocks separately. However, we observe that block-based compression cannot fully utilize the compression benefits due to the data mixture problem, while its performance issues hinder practical usage. We propose RubikFS, a sort-enhanced read-only file system. Our key idea is to solve data mixture by sorting and clustering similar data chunks in a file system-favored block granularity. This is achieved by similarity sorter , which builds a similarity graph to measure the similarity of data chunks and clusters similar chunks by subgraph partitioning. Moreover, sorting can also group data with the same hotness to minimize read amplification. We then introduce an array of techniques, including data grouper , data chunker , and hotness grouper , to implement condensed and efficient RubikFS. Experiments suggest that, compared to existing read-only compressed file systems, RubikFS increases the compression ratio by up to 42.60% and reduces unnecessary reads by up to 70.70%.
items.abstract_zh: 只读压缩文件系统在空间敏感的场景中变得越来越流行，例如物联网和 Docker 容器。为了构建压缩图像，他们将数据划分为块（例如 1 MB）并单独压缩块。然而，我们观察到，由于数据混合问题，基于块的压缩无法充分利用压缩优势，而其性能问题阻碍了实际使用。我们提出 RubikFS，一种排序增强型只读文件系统。我们的关键思想是通过在文件系统喜欢的块粒度中对相似的数据块进行排序和聚类来解决数据混合问题。这是通过相似性排序器实现的，它构建相似性图来测量数据块的相似性，并通过子图分区对相似的块进行聚类。而且，排序还可以将具有相同热度的数据分组，以最小化读放大。然后我们介绍一系列技术，包括数据分组器、数据分块器和热度分组器，来实现精简且高效的 RubikFS。实验表明，与现有的只读压缩文件系统相比，RubikFS 的压缩比提高了 42.60%，不必要的读取减少了 70.70%。

items.title: CETOFS: A High-Performance File System with Host-Server Collaboration for Remote Storage.
items.abstract: With the development of high-performance RDMA network and modern storage devices, disaggregated NVMe SSDs have become increasingly popular due to the high resource utilization and superior performance. Although existing kernel file systems (e.g., Ext4) can directly access the disaggregated SSD via the NVMe-over-RDMA protocol, the data path suffers from heavy kernel stack overhead and thus degraded performance. The extra networking latency introduced in accessing remote storage also prevents file system from achieving scalable concurrent accesses and efficient failure-atomic IO. In this paper, we present CETOFS, a high-performance file system with host-server collaboration for disaggregated NVMe SSD. CETOFS designs a userspace-kernel collaborative architecture to place data plane entirely in userspace meanwhile separate permission checking from in-kernel control plane. Then CETOFS exploits the processing capability of remote storage server to offload three tasks: permission checking, concurrency control, and failure-atomic IO guaranteeing. The offloading mechanisms greatly reduce the networking overhead. We implement CETOFS and evaluate it against both kernel and userspace file systems. The evaluation shows CETOFS achieves high-performance data path that reduces latency by up to 52% for single-threaded file access and improves throughput by up to 19X for concurrent accesses.
items.abstract_zh: 随着高性能RDMA网络和现代存储设备的发展，分解式NVMe SSD由于资源利用率高、性能优越而变得越来越受欢迎。尽管现有的内核文件系统（例如 Ext4）可以通过 NVMe-over-RDMA 协议直接访问分解的 SSD，但数据路径会遭受沉重的内核堆栈开销，从而导致性能下降。访问远程存储时引入的额外网络延迟还会阻止文件系统实现可扩展的并发访问和高效的故障原子 IO。在本文中，我们提出了 CETOFS，这是一种用于分解 NVMe SSD 的具有主机-服务器协作功能的高性能文件系统。 CETOFS设计了一种用户空间-内核协作架构，将数据平面完全放置在用户空间中，同时将权限检查与内核控制平面分开。然后CETOFS利用远程存储服务器的处理能力来卸载三个任务：权限检查、并发控制和故障原子IO保证。卸载机制大大减少了网络开销。我们实现 CETOFS 并针对内核和用户空间文件系统对其进行评估。评估显示，CETOFS 实现了高性能数据路径，可将单线程文件访问的延迟减少高达 52%，并将并发访问的吞吐量提高高达 19 倍。

items.title: Unleashing Zoned UFS: Cross-Layer Optimizations for Next-Generation Mobile Storage.
items.abstract: Zoned UFS (ZUFS) has emerged as a next-generation mobile storage technology that reduces the logical-to-physical (L2P) mapping overhead of conventional UFS (CUFS) by enforcing sequential writes within fixed-size zones. While the concept appears straightforward, deploying ZUFS in commercial smartphones introduces non-trivial challenges across the mobile storage stack. In this paper, we identify three key obstacles: managing limited SRAM across multiple open zones, ensuring end-to-end write ordering guarantees, and mitigating severe garbage collection overhead caused by large zones. We address these challenges through cross-layer optimizations spanning device firmware, the SCSI/UFS driver, the block layer, F2FS, and Android framework: a dynamic device-side buffer management scheme that opportunistically shares SRAM, a write ordering mechanism that eliminates reordering hazards, and a proactive garbage collection framework that reclaims free space in the background. Evaluation on a commercial smartphone shows that ZUFS sustains over 2x higher write throughput under fragmentation and reduces mobile game loading time by 14% compared to CUFS, while maintaining stable read performance. These results demonstrate that ZUFS’s full potential can only be realized through coordinated redesign across the entire mobile storage stack.
items.abstract_zh: 分区 UFS (ZUFS) 已成为下一代移动存储技术，它通过在固定大小区域内强制执行顺序写入来减少传统 UFS (CUFS) 的逻辑到物理 (L2P) 映射开销。虽然这个概念看起来很简单，但在商用智能手机中部署 ZUFS 给整个移动存储堆栈带来了不小的挑战。在本文中，我们确定了三个关键障碍：跨多个开放区域管理有限的 SRAM、确保端到端写入顺序保证以及减轻大区域造成的严重垃圾收集开销。我们通过跨越设备固件、SCSI/UFS 驱动程序、块层、F2FS 和 Android 框架的跨层优化来应对这些挑战：机会性地共享 SRAM 的动态设备端缓冲区管理方案、消除重新排序风险的写入排序机制以及在后台回收可用空间的主动垃圾收集框架。对商用智能手机的评估表明，与CUFS相比，ZUFS在碎片化情况下可维持2倍以上的写入吞吐量，并将手游加载时间减少14%，同时保持稳定的读取性能。这些结果表明，ZUFS 的全部潜力只能通过整个移动存储堆栈的协调重新设计来实现。

items.title: DOGI: Data Placement with Oracle-Guided Insights for Log-Structured Systems.
items.abstract: Log-structured systems have become the backbone of modern data-intensive applications thanks to their high write throughput. Their efficiency, however, is deteriorated by the write amplification factor (WAF) induced by garbage collection. Despite extensive studies, there still exists a wide gap between practice and optimality. In this paper, we bridge this gap with two key contributions. We first design NoDaP, a near-optimal oracle baseline that sets the upper bound for WAF reduction. Then, guided by insights from NoDaP, we propose DOGI, an oracle-inspired data placement technique that combines simple yet effective heuristics with lightweight machine learning. DOGI predicts invalidation times for data blocks with high accuracy, dynamically tunes group configurations, and finds the sweet spot between fine-grained data placement and misprediction penalty. Our experiments, using simulations and a prototype on a zoned device, show that DOGI reduces WAF by up to 23.2% while improving write throughput by up to 13.3% over the best-performing baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其高写入吞吐量，日志结构系统已成为现代数据密集型应用程序的支柱。然而，它们的效率因垃圾收集引起的写入放大因子（WAF）而降低。尽管进行了广泛的研究，实践与最优性之间仍然存在很大差距。在本文中，我们通过两个关键贡献弥补了这一差距。我们首先设计 NoDaP，这是一个接近最优的预言机基线，它设置了 WAF 减少的上限。然后，在 NoDaP 见解的指导下，我们提出了 DOGI，这是一种受 Oracle 启发的数据放置技术，它将简单而有效的启发式方法与轻量级机器学习相结合。 DOGI 能够高精度预测数据块的失效时间，动态调整组配置，并找到细粒度数据放置和误预测惩罚之间的最佳平衡点。我们在分区设备上使用模拟和原型进行的实验表明，与最佳性能基准相比，DOGI 将 WAF 减少了高达 23.2%，同时将写入吞吐量提高了高达 13.3%。

items.title: Accelerating Model Loading in LLM Inference by Programmable Page Cache.
items.abstract: This paper examines the model loading bottleneck during the LLM inference startup. Existing solutions often optimize model loading performance at the expense of compatibility. However, compatibility is a crucial factor determining whether a technology can be widely applied in real-world scenarios. This work achieves both high performance and strong compatibility by optimizing the cache policy of the kernel file system. We design PPC, a programmable page cache framework that allows users to customize page cache policies in a non-intrusive, flexible, and lightweight manner. Furthermore, we design MAIO, a cache policy implemented based on PPC, to optimize model loading. MAIO introduces an I/O template-based mechanism to fully utilize SSD bandwidth, XPU affinity, and data locality to enhance the efficiency of prefetching and eviction. Our evaluation shows that MAIO reduces the model loading latency by up to 79% compared to existing optimizations. In a real-world application, MAIO achieves up to 36% improvement in inference throughput over other tested solutions in the elastic deployment scenario.
items.abstract_zh: 本文研究了 LLM 推理启动期间的模型加载瓶颈。现有的解决方案通常以牺牲兼容性为代价来优化模型加载性能。然而，兼容性是决定一项技术能否广泛应用于现实场景的关键因素。本工作通过优化内核文件系统的缓存策略，实现了高性能和强兼容性。我们设计了PPC，一个可编程的页面缓存框架，允许用户以非侵入、灵活、轻量的方式定制页面缓存策略。此外，我们设计了基于PPC实现的缓存策略MAIO来优化模型加载。 MAIO引入了基于I/O模板的机制，充分利用SSD带宽、XPU亲和性和数据局部性来提高预取和逐出的效率。我们的评估表明，与现有优化相比，MAIO 将模型加载延迟降低了高达 79%。在实际应用中，MAIO 在弹性部署场景中的推理吞吐量比其他经过测试的解决方案提高了 36%。

items.title: CacheSlide: Unlocking Cross Position-Aware KV Cache Reuse for Accelerating LLM Serving.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in agent-based applications with complex prompt structures comprising both invariant and dynamic segments. Existing KV cache reuse strategies—PositionDependent Caching (PDC) and Position-Independent Caching (PIC)—inadequately address these scenarios, imposing either strict positional constraints or introducing significant computational overhead due to Positionally Misaligned KV Drift (PMKD) and window padding problems. We identify a distinct pattern in agent workflows termed Relative-Position-Dependent Caching (RPDC), where reusable segments maintain consistent relative ordering despite absolute position shifts. To address this pattern, we propose CacheSlide, a novel KV cache management system that enhances positional-encoding similarity for fixed segments, computes attention for only a minimal subset of tokens, combines new and cached KVs using learned weights, and implements layer-wise and spill-aware KV-cache optimizations. Our implementation extends vLLM’s KV cache management with Chunked Contextual Position Encoding and Weighted Correction Attention. Experimental evaluation across multiple LLMs and agent benchmarks demonstrates that CacheSlide significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving 3.11-4.3× reduction in latency and 3.5-5.8× improvement in throughput, establishing a new efficiency frontier for agent-based LLM applications.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地部署在基于代理的应用程序中，这些应用程序具有包含不变和动态段的复杂提示结构。现有的 KV 缓存重用策略——位置相关缓存 (PDC) 和位置无关缓存 (PIC)——不足以解决这些场景，要么施加严格的位置约束，要么由于位置未对齐的 KV 漂移 (PMKD) 和窗口填充问题而引入大量计算开销。我们在代理工作流程中发现了一种独特的模式，称为相对位置相关缓存（RPDC），其中可重用段尽管绝对位置发生变化，但仍保持一致的相对顺序。为了解决这种模式，我们提出了 CacheSlide，一种新颖的 KV 缓存管理系统，它增强了固定片段的位置编码相似性，仅计算令牌的最小子集的注意力，使用学习权重组合新的和缓存的 KV，并实现分层和溢出感知的 KV 缓存优化。我们的实现通过分块上下文位置编码和加权校正注意力扩展了 vLLM 的 KV 缓存管理。跨多个 LLM 和代理基准测试的实验评估表明，CacheSlide 的性能显着优于最先进的基准，延迟减少了 3.11-4.3 倍，吞吐量提高了 3.5-5.8 倍，为基于代理的 LLM 应用程序建立了新的效率前沿。

items.title: AdaCheck: An Adaptive Checkpointing System for Efficient LLM Training with Redundancy Utilization.
items.abstract: The development of large language models (LLMs) relies on sophisticated parallel training techniques, involving prolonged training runs with thousands of workers. Checkpointing systems are essential for handling failures in large-scale training. However, existing checkpointing systems are almost offline solutions tailored to specific parallelisms or model architectures. They lack adaptability to diverse parallel strategies and fail to recognize that most model states can be excluded from checkpoints, missing optimization opportunities. In this paper, we present AdaCheck, an adaptive checkpointing system that achieves minimized checkpoint size by characterizing and exploiting state redundancy across various parallelisms, model architectures, and training iterations. We model the state redundancy induced by parallelisms and model architectures using the abstraction tensor redundancy, and propose an offline redundancy utilization method to create checkpoints with a reduced set of states. To fully identify tensor redundancy, we design an efficient redundancy detector, which employs a hash-based data consistency check method and a ring-based communication algorithm. Besides, we introduce a novel online redundancy utilization method, which further reduces checkpoint size by exploiting the state redundancy across training iterations. Experimental results demonstrate that AdaCheck is adaptable to various parallelisms, including irregular parallelisms generated by automatic planners, as well as diverse model architectures, encompassing both dense and sparse architectures. Compared with state-of-the-art checkpointing approaches, AdaCheck can reduce checkpoint size by 6.00–896×, increase the checkpointing frequency by 1.46–111×, and incur almost no overhead on training throughput for LLM training.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的开发依赖于复杂的并行训练技术，涉及数千名工作人员的长时间训练。检查点系统对于处理大规模训练中的故障至关重要。然而，现有的检查点系统几乎是针对特定并行性或模型架构量身定制的离线解决方案。他们缺乏对不同并行策略的适应性，并且无法认识到大多数模型状态可以被排除在检查点之外，从而错过优化机会。在本文中，我们提出了 AdaCheck，这是一种自适应检查点系统，它通过表征和利用跨各种并行性、模型架构和训练迭代的状态冗余来实现最小化检查点大小。我们使用抽象张量冗余对并行性和模型架构引起的状态冗余进行建模，并提出一种离线冗余利用方法来创建具有减少的状态集的检查点。为了充分识别张量冗余，我们设计了一种高效的冗余检测器，该检测器采用基于散列的数据一致性检查方法和基于环的通信算法。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的在线冗余利用方法，该方法通过利用训练迭代中的状态冗余来进一步减小检查点大小。实验结果表明，AdaCheck 可适应各种并行性，包括自动规划器生成的不规则并行性，以及各种模型架构，包括密集和稀疏架构。与最先进的检查点方法相比，AdaCheck 可以将检查点大小减少 6.00–896×，将检查点频率增加 1.46–111×，并且几乎不会对 LLM 训练的训练吞吐量产生任何开销。

items.title: Sharpen the Spec, Cut the Code: A Case for Generative File System with SYSSPEC.
items.abstract: File systems are critical OS components that require constant evolution to support new hardware and emerging application needs. However, the traditional paradigm of developing features, fixing bugs, and maintaining the system incurs significant overhead, especially as systems grow in complexity. This paper proposes a new paradigm, generative file systems , which leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate and evolve a file system from prompts, effectively addressing the need for robust evolution. Despite the widespread success of LLMs in code generation, attempts to create a functional file system have thus far been unsuccessful, mainly due to the ambiguity of natural language prompts. This paper introduces SYSSPEC, a framework for developing generative file systems. Its key insight is to replace ambiguous natural language with principles adapted from formal methods . Instead of imprecise prompts, SYSSPEC employs a multi-part specification that accurately describes a file system's functionality, modularity, and concurrency. The specification acts as an unambiguous blueprint, guiding LLMs to generate expected code flexibly. To manage evolution, we develop a DAG-structured patch that operates on the specification itself, enabling new features to be added without violating existing invariants. Moreover, the SYSSPEC toolchain features a set of LLM-based agents with mechanisms to mitigate hallucination during construction and evolution. We demonstrate our approach by generating SPECFS, a concurrent file system. SPECFS demonstrates equivalent level of correctness to that of a manually-coded baseline across hundreds of regression tests. We further confirm its evolvability by seamlessly integrating 10 real-world features from Ext4. Our work shows that a specification-guided approach makes generating and evolving complex systems not only feasible but also highly effective.
items.abstract_zh: 文件系统是关键的操作系统组件，需要不断发展才能支持新硬件和新兴应用程序需求。然而，开发功能、修复错误和维护系统的传统模式会产生巨大的开销，尤其是当系统变得越来越复杂时。本文提出了一种新的范例，即生成文件系统，它利用大型语言模型（LLM）根据提示生成和演化文件系统，有效地解决了鲁棒演化的需求。尽管法学硕士在代码生成方面取得了广泛的成功，但迄今为止创建功能性文件系统的尝试尚未成功，这主要是由于自然语言提示的模糊性。本文介绍了 SYSSPEC，一个用于开发生成文件系统的框架。其主要见解是用形式化方法改编的原则取代模糊的自然语言。 SYSSPEC 采用多部分规范来准确描述文件系统的功能、模块化和并发性，而不是不精确的提示。该规范充当了明确的蓝图，指导法学硕士灵活地生成预期的代码。为了管理演化，我们开发了一个 DAG 结构的补丁，该补丁在规范本身上运行，从而可以在不违反现有不变性的情况下添加新功能。此外，SYSSPEC 工具链具有一组基于 LLM 的代理，具有减轻构建和演化过程中幻觉的机制。我们通过生成并发文件系统 SPECFS 来演示我们的方法。 SPECFS 在数百个回归测试中展示了与手动编码基线相当的正确性水平。我们通过无缝集成 Ext4 的 10 个现实世界功能，进一步确认了其可进化性。我们的工作表明，规范引导的方法使得生成和演进复杂系统不仅可行，而且非常有效。

items.title: uCache: A Customizable Unikernel-based IO Cache.
items.abstract: Data-intensive cloud applications require high-performance IO caching to fully leverage modern storage systems like NVMe SSDs and cloud storage. Today’s developers face a dilemma: choose a simple, but often slow, OS-level IO cache, or a fast, but complex, userspace cache. This trade-off forces developers to sacrifice either performance or simplicity. This paper introduces uCache, a novel IO cache that resolves this fundamental tension. Leveraging a unikernel-based libOS architecture, uCache seamlessly integrates application-specific knowledge directly into the OS-level cache. It combines an mmap-like memory surface with an explicit, conventional interface, offering fine-grained control over cache behavior. This design allows for the seamless integration of application-specific semantics within the OS-level cache itself—a capability previously confined to complex userspace solutions; thus, ensuring scalability, performance, and adaptability. The core of uCache’s flexibility is the uVFS abstraction, which enables direct adaptation to diverse IO backends while maintaining filesystem compatibility without the performance overheads of the traditional OS IO stack. Our evaluation demonstrates that uCache effectively merges the simplicity of OS-level caches with the performance and flexibility of userspace solutions. For out-of-memory workloads, uCache achieves performance on par with kernel-bypass IO libraries, proving it can eliminate the IO caching bottleneck for data-intensive applications.
items.abstract_zh: 数据密集型云应用程序需要高性能 IO 缓存，以充分利用 NVMe SSD 和云存储等现代存储系统。当今的开发人员面临着两难境地：选择简单但通常很慢的操作系统级 IO 缓存，还是快速但复杂的用户空间缓存。这种权衡迫使开发人员牺牲性能或简单性。本文介绍了 uCache，一种新型 IO 缓存，可以解决这一根本问题。 uCache 利用基于 unikernel 的 libOS 架构，将特定于应用程序的知识直接无缝集成到操作系统级缓存中。它将类似 mmap 的内存表面与显式的传统接口相结合，提供对缓存行为的细粒度控制。这种设计允许在操作系统级缓存本身内无缝集成应用程序特定的语义——这种功能以前仅限于复杂的用户空间解决方案；从而确保可扩展性、性能和适应性。 uCache灵活性的核心是uVFS抽象，它能够直接适应不同的IO后端，同时保持文件系统兼容性，而无需传统操作系统IO堆栈的性能开销。我们的评估表明，uCache 有效地将操作系统级缓存的简单性与用户空间解决方案的性能和灵活性结合起来。对于内存不足的工作负载，uCache 的性能与内核旁路 IO 库相当，证明它可以消除数据密集型应用程序的 IO 缓存瓶颈。

items.title: DRBoost: Boosting Degraded Read Performance in MSR-Coded Storage Clusters.
items.abstract: Minimum Storage Regenerating (MSR) codes have strong potential for building efficient and reliable storage systems due to their excellent fault tolerance and low repair bandwidth. However, to meet MSR code constraints and optimize storage performance, systems often adopt large chunk sizes. This leads to significant I/O amplification during degraded reads, as entire chunks must be reconstructed to access a single object. In this paper, we propose DRBoost, an approach that boosts degraded read performance in MSR-coded storage clusters by reducing repair bandwidth and eliminating access fragmentation for healthy data. DRBoost introduces three key techniques: (1) a partial-chunk reconstruction algorithm that reduces repair bandwidth by leveraging two forms of data reuse; (2) a reconstruction-friendly coding layout that improves reuse efficiency and accommodates objects of diverse sizes; and (3) a fragmentation-free storage layout that avoids unnecessary request splitting. Extensive experiments under various conditions and workloads show that DRBoost reduces degraded read latency by one to two orders of magnitude, significantly improving system responsiveness.
items.abstract_zh: 最小存储再生（MSR）代码由于其出色的容错能力和较低的修复带宽，在构建高效可靠的存储系统方面具有强大的潜力。然而，为了满足 MSR 代码约束并优化存储性能，系统通常采用大块大小。这会导致在降级读取期间出现显着的 I/O 放大，因为必须重建整个块才能访问单个对象。在本文中，我们提出了 DRBoost，这是一种通过减少修复带宽和消除健康数据的访问碎片来提高 MSR 编码存储集群中降低的读取性能的方法。 DRBoost 引入了三个关键技术：（1）部分块重建算法，通过利用两种形式的数据重用来减少修复带宽； （2）重构友好的编码布局，提高重用效率并适应不同尺寸的对象； (3)无碎片存储布局，避免不必要的请求拆分。在各种条件和工作负载下进行的大量实验表明，DRBoost 可将降低的读取延迟降低一到两个数量级，从而显着提高系统响应能力。

items.title: UnICom: A Universally High-Performant I/O Completion Mechanism for Modern Computer Systems.
items.abstract: Modern computer systems are increasingly equipped with dozens to hundreds of cores, while high-performance Solid-State Drives (SSDs), enabled by NVMe and emerging technologies such as CXL-SSDs, provide massive I/O bandwidth and microsecond-scale latency. Yet, software overhead in the I/O stack remains a critical bottleneck, often contributing up to 50% of total I/O latency. Existing I/O completion mechanisms fall short: polling achieves low latency but wastes CPU cycles, whereas interrupts conserve CPU resources but incur significant wake-up overhead. This paper presents UnICom (Universal I/O Completion), a new I/O completion mechanism that unifies the benefits of polling and interrupts while avoiding their drawbacks. The key insight is that a kernel trap is negligible compared to disk I/O latency, yet enables access to kernel infrastructure for efficiency and security. Building on this, UnICom introduces three core techniques: TagSched, a lightweight tag-guided scheduling mechanism that minimizes sleep and wake-up overhead; TagPoll, a centralized kernel-level I/O completion thread that consolidates polling across threads and processes; and SKIP, a kernel-assisted direct-access mechanism that eliminates complex user-space permission management. Together, these techniques enable efficient multi-process support and direct SSD access while bypassing much of the kernel I/O stack. We implement UnICom in the Linux kernel and evaluate it against ext4, BypassD, and io_uring. Across all experiments, UnICom consistently delivers high I/O performance, matching or exceeding the best of polling and interrupts under both low and high CPU utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 现代计算机系统越来越多地配备数十到数百个内核，而由 NVMe 和 CXL-SSD 等新兴技术支持的高性能固态硬盘 (SSD) 可提供海量 I/O 带宽和微秒级延迟。然而，I/O 堆栈中的软件开销仍然是一个关键瓶颈，通常占总 I/O 延迟的 50%。现有的 I/O 完成机制存在不足：轮询可以实现低延迟，但会浪费 CPU 周期，而中断可以节省 CPU 资源，但会产生大量的唤醒开销。本文介绍了 UniCom（通用 I/O 完成），这是一种新的 I/O 完成机制，它结合了轮询和中断的优点，同时避免了它们的缺点。关键的见解是，与磁盘 I/O 延迟相比，内核陷阱可以忽略不计，但可以访问内核基础设施以提高效率和安全性。在此基础上，联通推出了三项核心技术：TagSched，一种轻量级标签引导调度机制，可最大限度地减少睡眠和唤醒开销； TagPoll，集中式内核级 I/O 完成线程，整合跨线程和进程的轮询； SKIP，一种内核辅助的直接访问机制，消除了复杂的用户空间权限管理。这些技术共同实现了高效的多进程支持和直接 SSD 访问，同时绕过了大部分内核 I/O 堆栈。我们在 Linux 内核中实现 UniCom，并针对 ext4、BypassD 和 io_uring 对其进行评估。在所有实验中，UniCom 始终如一地提供高 I/O 性能，在低 CPU 利用率和高 CPU 利用率下均达到或超过最佳轮询和中断性能。

items.title: Lockify: Understanding Linux Distributed Lock Management Overheads in Shared Storage.
items.abstract: This paper presents Lockify, a novel distributed lock manager (DLM) for shared-disk file systems. Our key observation in shared-storage scenarios is that, for file or directory creation, lock acquisition overhead in the Linux kernel DLM increases with the number of clients, even in low-contention scenarios. Lockify minimizes this lock acquisition latency by avoiding unnecessary communication with remote directory nodes through self-owner notifications and asynchronous ownership management . We implement Lockify in the Linux kernel and evaluate its performance on real-world workloads using two representative shared-disk file systems, GFS2 and OCFS2. Our experimental results demonstrate that Lockify improves overall throughput by ~6.4× compared to the kernel DLM and O2CB, consistently across different numbers of clients.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Lockify，一种用于共享磁盘文件系统的新型分布式锁管理器 (DLM)。我们在共享存储场景中的主要观察结果是，对于文件或目录创建，Linux 内核 DLM 中的锁获取开销随着客户端数量的增加而增加，即使在低争用场景中也是如此。 Lockify 通过自身所有者通知和异步所有权管理避免与远程目录节点进行不必要的通信，从而最大限度地减少了锁获取延迟。我们在 Linux 内核中实现 Lockify，并使用两个代表性的共享磁盘文件系统（GFS2 和 OCFS2）评估其在实际工作负载上的性能。我们的实验结果表明，与内核 DLM 和 O2CB 相比，Lockify 将总体吞吐量提高了约 6.4 倍，并且在不同数量的客户端上保持一致。

items.title: RosenBridge: A Framework for Enabling Express I/O Paths Across the Virtualization Boundary.
items.abstract: With the emergence of high-performance storage devices, the overhead of the storage stack has become a major I/O performance bottleneck. To alleviate this problem, a number of express I/O paths have been proposed based on the concept of near-data processing (NDP), such as query I/O resubmission (XRP) and GPU-direct storage (GDS). Unfortunately, in virtualized environments, none of these bare-metal express I/O paths can cross the virtualization boundary between the guest virtual machines (VMs) and the host, leaving applications inside guest VMs unable to benefit from them. This paper presents RosenBridge, a framework for enabling express I/O paths across the virtualization boundary. At the core of RosenBridge is a new paravirtualized I/O device called virtio-ndp, which allows the guest to offload NDP optimizations to the hypervisor in the host userspace based on uBPF (userspace Berkeley Packet Filter). We connect the virtio-ndp backend with the host kernel’s asynchronous I/O stack for efficient I/O scheduling, and provide a set of helper functions for convenient guest-host address translation. We strictly limit the memory access scope of uBPF programs to guarantee security and collaboratively throttle the multi-path I/O to ensure fairness among guest VMs. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RosenBridge through two use cases, respectively supporting XRP and GDS in virtualized environments. Evaluation shows that RosenBridge significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art I/O paravirtualization frameworks (virtio and vhost) in I/O performance, while effectively reducing CPU usage. Compared to the bare-metal express I/O paths (XRP and GDS), RosenBridge only incurs a slight performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 随着高性能存储设备的出现，存储堆栈的开销成为主要的I/O性能瓶颈。为了缓解这个问题，基于近数据处理（NDP）的概念提出了许多快速I/O路径，例如查询I/O重新提交（XRP）和GPU直接存储（GDS）。不幸的是，在虚拟化环境中，这些裸机快速 I/O 路径都无法跨越来宾虚拟机 (VM) 和主机之间的虚拟化边界，从而使来宾 VM 内的应用程序无法从中受益。本文介绍了 RosenBridge，一个用于跨虚拟化边界启用快速 I/O 路径的框架。 RosenBridge 的核心是一个名为 virtio-ndp 的新型半虚拟化 I/O 设备，它允许来宾基于 uBPF（用户空间伯克利数据包过滤器）将 NDP 优化卸载到主机用户空间中的虚拟机管理程序。我们将 virtio-ndp 后端与主机内核的异步 I/O 堆栈连接起来，以实现高效的 I/O 调度，并提供一组辅助函数以方便来宾主机地址转换。我们严格限制uBPF程序的内存访问范围以保证安全性，并协同限制多路径I/O以确保来宾VM之间的公平性。我们通过两个用例展示了 RosenBridge 的有效性，分别支持虚拟化环境中的 XRP 和 GDS。评估表明，RosenBridge 在 I/O 性能方面显着优于最先进的 I/O 半虚拟化框架（virtio 和 vhost），同时有效降低了 CPU 占用率。与裸机快速 I/O 路径（XRP 和 GDS）相比，RosenBridge 仅导致轻微的性能下降。

items.title: Holistic and Automated Task Scheduling for Distributed LSM-tree-based Storage.
items.abstract: Mitigating latency fluctuations for distributed key-value (KV) stores is critical, yet it is often hindered by the tight coupling of foreground and background tasks related to data distribution and storage management. Using Cassandra, a widely deployed distributed LSM-tree-based KV store, as a case study, we observe that foreground read tasks are often interfered with by background compaction tasks, yet compaction tasks are critical for achieving high read performance. We propose HATS, a holistic and automated task scheduling framework that judiciously co-schedules read and compaction tasks, so as to mitigate latency fluctuations and achieve load balancing. HATS features coarse-grained and fine-grained replica selection for reads as well as adaptive rate control for compaction. We implement HATS atop Cassandra and demonstrate its improved latency and throughput performance over state-of-the-art distributed LSM-tree-based KV stores.
items.abstract_zh: 减轻分布式键值 (KV) 存储的延迟波动至关重要，但它常常受到与数据分发和存储管理相关的前台和后台任务的紧密耦合的阻碍。使用广泛部署的基于 LSM 树的分布式 KV 存储 Cassandra 作为案例研究，我们观察到前台读取任务经常受到后台压缩任务的干扰，但压缩任务对于实现高读取性能至关重要。我们提出了 HATS，一个整体的自动化任务调度框架，可以明智地共同调度读取和压缩任务，从而减轻延迟波动并实现负载平衡。 HATS 具有用于读取的粗粒度和细粒度副本选择以及用于压缩的自适应速率控制。我们在 Cassandra 之上实现了 HATS，并展示了其相对于最先进的基于 LSM 树的分布式 KV 存储改进的延迟和吞吐量性能。

items.title: DPAS: A Prompt, Accurate and Safe I/O Completion Method for SSDs.
items.abstract: Modern SSDs demand faster I/O completion methods. While polling is a potential alternative to interrupts, it suffers under CPU contention. Hybrid polling mitigates this by sleeping early and polling later, yet it cannot keep up with rapidly varying I/O latencies and incurs context-switch overheads. We introduce PAS, an accurate latency tracking method for hybrid polling that adjusts sleep duration using the two most recent I/Os, and DPAS, which dynamically switches among polling, interrupts, and PAS to overcome the inherent drawbacks of hybrid polling. Experiments show that PAS reduces CPU usage by 21 percentage points compared to Linux hybrid polling for 4 KB random reads, and DPAS improves YCSB performance by 9% on a 3D XPoint SSD and 5% on a TLC NAND SSD, even under simultaneous CPU contention and I/O interference.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 SSD 需要更快的 I/O 完成方法。虽然轮询是中断的潜在替代方案，但它会受到 CPU 争用的影响。混合轮询通过提前睡眠和稍后轮询来缓解这种情况，但它无法跟上快速变化的 I/O 延迟并产生上下文切换开销。我们引入了 PAS，一种用于混合轮询的精确延迟跟踪方法，可使用最近的两个 I/O 来调整睡眠持续时间；以及 DPAS，可在轮询、中断和 PAS 之间动态切换，以克服混合轮询的固有缺点。实验表明，与 4 KB 随机读取的 Linux 混合轮询相比，PAS 可以将 CPU 使用率降低 21 个百分点，即使在同时发生 CPU 争用和 I/O 干扰的情况下，DPAS 也可以将 3D XPoint SSD 上的 YCSB 性能提高 9%，在 TLC NAND SSD 上提高 5%。

items.title: Characterizing and Emulating FDP SSDs with WARP.
items.abstract: Flexible Data Placement (FDP) promises to reduce write amplification by steering writes across reclaim unit handles (RUHs), yet outcomes vary widely across devices. This paper presents WARP, the first open emulator and comprehensive study of FDP SSDs. Our cross-device, cross-workload characterization shows that FDP sustains near-1 WAF when RUH isolation aligns with object lifetimes, but fails under misclassification, RUH interference, or adversarial invalidations. WARP reproduces hardware WAF trends while exposing per-RUH dynamics and configurable policies hidden in real devices. With WARP, we explore the firmware design space for FDP and demonstrate policies that reduce WAF beyond current hardware. By combining empirical characterization with a transparent emulator, this work advances FDP research from anecdotal reports to principled understanding and provides a platform for future FDP-aware system design.
items.abstract_zh: 灵活数据放置 (FDP) 承诺通过跨回收单元句柄 (RUH) 引导写入来减少写入放大，但不同设备的结果差异很大。本文介绍了 WARP，第一个开放仿真器和 FDP SSD 的综合研究。我们的跨设备、跨工作负载特征表明，当 RUH 隔离与对象生命周期一致时，FDP 可以维持接近 1 WAF，但在错误分类、RUH 干扰或对抗性失效的情况下会失败。 WARP 再现硬件 WAF 趋势，同时暴露真实设备中隐藏的每个 RUH 动态和可配置策略。通过 WARP，我们探索了 FDP 的固件设计空间，并演示了将 WAF 减少到当前硬件之外的策略。通过将经验表征与透明仿真器相结合，这项工作将 FDP 研究从轶事报告推进到原则性理解，并为未来的 FDP 感知系统设计提供了一个平台。

items.title: Getting the MOST out of your Storage Hierarchy with Mirror-Optimized Storage Tiering.
items.abstract: We present Mirror-Optimized Storage Tiering (MOST), a novel tiering-based approach optimized for modern storage hierarchies. The key idea of MOST is to combine the load-balancing advantages of mirroring with the space-efficiency advantages of tiering. Specifically, MOST dynamically mirrors a small amount of hot data across storage tiers to efficiently balance load, avoiding costly migrations. As a result, MOST is as space-efficient as classic tiering while achieving better bandwidth utilization under I/O-intensive workloads. We implement MOST in Cerberus, a user-level storage management layer based on CacheLib. We show the efficacy of Cerberus through a comprehensive empirical study: across a range of static and dynamic workloads, Cerberus achieves better throughput than competing approaches on modern storage hierarchies especially under I/O-intensive and dynamic workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出镜像优化存储分层 (MOST)，这是一种针对现代存储层次结构进行优化的新颖的基于分层的方法。 MOST 的关键思想是将镜像的负载平衡优势与分层的空间效率优势结合起来。具体来说，MOST 跨存储层动态镜像少量热数据，以有效平衡负载，避免昂贵的迁移。因此，MOST 与经典分层一样节省空间，同时在 I/O 密集型工作负载下实现更好的带宽利用率。我们在 Cerberus 中实现了 MOST，Cerberus 是一个基于 CacheLib 的用户级存储管理层。我们通过全面的实证研究展示了 Cerberus 的功效：在一系列静态和动态工作负载中，Cerberus 比现代存储层次结构上的竞争方法实现了更好的吞吐量，特别是在 I/O 密集型和动态工作负载下。

items.title: CoFS: A Filesystem for Fast Container Startup.
items.abstract: The running of applications in containers has emerged as a popular trend in the industry. The cold start of a container involves a sequential time-consuming process of image downloading and image unpacking. The high cold-start latency significantly prolongs the startup time of containerized applications and could potentially violate responsiveness SLAs in serverless computing or during service automatic scaling to handle burst requests. To accelerate container startup, state-of-the-art systems pull the container image on demand. Unfortunately, they suffer from userspace I/O interposition overhead, maintainability, and/or performance fluctuation. This paper presents CoFS, a novel filesystem based on extended FUSE for fast container startup. The insight is that the container image is built only once with a fixed read-only filesystem tree from the perspective of containers. This motivates CoFS to construct a minimal perfect hash function (MPHF) at image building time and to store metadata of files in a container image in a dense array indexed by their hash value. MPHF is collision-free and space-optimal. Leveraging the excellent properties of MPHF, CoFS accomplishes lookup request through less than one single I/O operation in most cases (unless the filename is excessively long) from kernel space, effectively avoiding the costly userspace lookup process in FUSE. Furthermore, CoFS constructs another MPHF that enables parallel lookup based on full path hashing, so as to further accelerate the path resolution. For data access, CoFS leverages sparse files provided by the in-kernel host filesystem to implement fine-grained data caching, and accesses cached data from kernel space. The evaluation shows that CoFS outperforms state-of-the-art systems that achieve fast container startup, and compared to fuse-loopback, a FUSE-based loopback filesystem, the lookup performance improves by up to 86%.
items.abstract_zh: 在容器中运行应用程序已成为业界的流行趋势。容器的冷启动涉及到镜像下载和镜像解包的顺序耗时过程。高冷启动延迟会显着延长容器化应用程序的启动时间，并可能违反无服务器计算中或服务自动扩展以处理突发请求期间的响应性 SLA。为了加速容器启动，最先进的系统按需拉取容器映像。不幸的是，它们受到用户空间 I/O 插入开销、可维护性和/或性能波动的影响。本文介绍了 CoFS，一种基于扩展 FUSE 的新型文件系统，用于快速容器启动。从容器的角度来看，容器镜像仅使用固定的只读文件系统树构建一次。这促使 CoFS 在镜像构建时构建最小完美哈希函数 (MPHF)，并将容器镜像中文件的元数据存储在按哈希值索引的密集数组中。 MPHF 无碰撞且空间最优。利用 MPHF 的优良特性，CoFS 在大多数情况下（除非文件名过长）从内核空间通过少于一次 I/O 操作完成查找请求，有效避免了 FUSE 中昂贵的用户空间查找过程。此外，CoFS构建了另一个MPHF，可以基于全路径哈希进行并行查找，从而进一步加速路径解析。对于数据访问，CoFS利用内核内主机文件系统提供的稀疏文件来实现细粒度的数据缓存，并从内核空间访问缓存的数据。评估结果表明，CoFS 的性能优于实现容器快速启动的最先进系统，并且与基于 FUSE 的环回文件系统 fusion-loopback 相比，查找性能提升高达 86%。

items.title: Cost-efficient Archive Cloud Storage with Tape: Design and Deployment.
items.abstract: TapeOBS is an archive storage service offered by Huawei Cloud, which delivers high cost-efficiency by leveraging tape to store large volumes of archived data. Although tape boasts a low total cost of ownership, its inherent characteristics (e.g., a limited number of drives within a tape library) pose unique challenges when developing a large-scale distributed storage system. To address these challenges, we take a holistic approach in designing TapeOBS. At the high level, we introduce a fully asynchronous tape pool, which supports data scheduling and erasure coding in a batched manner, aligning with the features of tape hardware. Within a tape library, we design a tape-tailored local storage engine and incorporate techniques such as dedicated drives to optimize performance. TapeOBS began its gradual rollout at the end of 2022 and officially started serving customers in 2024. As of this writing, TapeOBS has stored hundreds of petabytes of raw user data.
items.abstract_zh: TapeOBS是华为云提供的归档存储服务，利用磁带存储大量归档数据，具有较高的性价比。尽管磁带拥有较低的总拥有成本，但其固有的特性（例如，磁带库中的驱动器数量有限）在开发大规模分布式存储系统时提出了独特的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们采用整体方法来设计 TapeOBS。在高层，我们引入了完全异步的磁带池，它支持批量数据调度和纠删码，与磁带硬件的特性保持一致。在磁带库中，我们设计了一个针对磁带定制的本地存储引擎，并结合了专用驱动器等技术来优化性能。 TapeOBS 于 2022 年底开始逐步推出，并于 2024 年正式开始为客户提供服务。截至撰写本文时，TapeOBS 已存储数百 PB 的原始用户数据。

items.title: FailureMiner: A Joint Key Decision Mining Scheme for Practical SSD Failure Prediction and Analysis.
items.abstract: As SSDs become increasingly popular in enterprise data centers, SSD failures have become a key concern for storage system reliability. In this paper, we propose FailureMiner, a joint key decision mining scheme based on SSD monitoring attributes to accurately and clearly identify SSD failure patterns in production environments. First, to address the imbalance between healthy and failed samples caused by the limited number of failed SSDs, FailureMiner introduces selective downsampling to carefully remove non-critical healthy samples, thereby focusing more on the subtle differences between easily confused failure patterns and health patterns. Second, FailureMiner streamlines the decision-making process of the machine learning model in failure prediction by capturing key decision steps based on their joint contribution. By filtering out redundant and noisy information, FailureMiner can capture joint key decisions, i.e., the simplified attribute combinations and value ranges relevant to failures, thus enabling accurate and interpretable identification of failure patterns. FailureMiner is evaluated on real-world datasets, and the results show that our scheme improves precision and recall by an average of 38.6% and 80.5% respectively, compared with the existing failure prediction methods. The extracted joint key decisions have been deployed in Tencent's data centers to predict failures across more than 350,000 SSDs over a year, enhancing SSD reliability. The joint key decisions also reveal the failure patterns and factors affecting SSD health, which further helps operators handle failures and manufacturers improve product reliability.
items.abstract_zh: 随着SSD在企业数据中心的日益普及，SSD故障已成为存储系统可靠性的关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了 FailureMiner，一种基于 SSD 监控属性的联合关键决策挖掘方案，可以准确清晰地识别生产环境中的 SSD 故障模式。首先，为了解决因故障SSD数量有限而导致的健康样本和故障样本之间的不平衡问题，FailureMiner引入了选择性下采样，仔细剔除非关键的健康样本，从而更加关注容易混淆的故障模式和健康模式之间的细微差别。其次，FailureMiner 通过根据共同贡献捕获关键决策步骤，简化了机器学习模型在故障预测中的决策过程。通过过滤掉冗余和噪声信息，FailureMiner 可以捕获联合关键决策，即与故障相关的简化属性组合和值范围，从而实现准确且可解释的故障模式识别。 FailureMiner 在真实数据集上进行了评估，结果表明，与现有的故障预测方法相比，我们的方案的精度和召回率平均分别提高了 38.6% 和 80.5%。提取的联合关键决策已部署在腾讯数据中心，以预测一年内超过 350,000 个 SSD 的故障，从而提高 SSD 的可靠性。联合关键决策还揭示了影响SSD健康状况的故障模式和因素，这进一步帮助运营商处理故障和制造商提高产品可靠性。

items.title: DMTree: Towards Efficient Tree Indexing on Disaggregated Memory via Compute-side Collaborative Design.
items.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) separates computing and memory resources into distinct resource pools, enhancing resource utilization and scalability. However, this new architecture presents fundamental design challenges on range indexes. Existing works fail to achieve high performance: they either suffer from the network bandwidth bottleneck or are fragile due to high RDMA IOPS demands. The key reason is that they all follow a typical design paradigm that uses private compute-side caching , where each compute server holds a private cache space and aggressively consumes the bandwidth and IOPS between compute servers and memory servers. We propose a new compute-side collaborative design . It offloads data locating and locking operations from memory servers to compute servers and thus fully utilizes unsaturated RDMA resources between compute servers to mitigate bottlenecks on memory servers. We implement a prototype called DMTree. Experiments show that DMTree outperforms existing state-of-the-art range indexes on DM for both point operations (i.e., searches, inserts, and updates) and range operations (i.e., scans) under various workloads and parameter settings.
items.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）将计算和内存资源分离到不同的资源池中，提高资源利用率和可扩展性。然而，这种新架构对范围索引提出了基本的设计挑战。现有的工作无法实现高性能：它们要么遭受网络带宽瓶颈，要么由于高 RDMA IOPS 需求而脆弱。关键原因是它们都遵循使用私有计算端缓存的典型设计范例，其中每个计算服务器都拥有私有缓存空间，并大量消耗计算服务器和内存服务器之间的带宽和 IOPS。我们提出了一种新的计算端协作设计。它将数据定位和锁定操作从内存服务器卸载到计算服务器，从而充分利用计算服务器之间不饱和的RDMA资源来缓解内存服务器的瓶颈。我们实现了一个名为 DMTree 的原型。实验表明，在各种工作负载和参数设置下，DMTree 在点操作（即搜索、插入和更新）和范围操作（即扫描）方面均优于 DM 上现有的最先进的范围索引。

items.title: MlsDisk: Trusted Block Storage for TEEs Based on Layered Secure Logging.
items.abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) enable users to run sensitive applications in private memory regions. SGX-PFS is the state-of-the-art secure storage solution for TEEs that ensures data confidentiality, integrity, freshness, and consistency (CIFC). Unfortunately, SGX-PFS uses Merkle Hash Trees to protect in-place persisted data and suffers from poor I/O performance and is thus of limited use in practice. This paper presents MlsDisk, a secure virtual disk that adopts out-of-place logging to provide efficient trusted block storage for TEEs. The challenge is that the complexity of indexing and garbage collection (GC) in log-structured storage makes it difficult to ensure security. We therefore adopt a layered design to break down the indexing and GC into four layers of abstractions, which facilitates reasoning about CIFC properties. Evaluation shows that MlsDisk, with CIFC guarantees, outperforms SGX-PFS by 7.3×–21.1× on microbenchmarks and 1.4×–3.6× on trace-driven workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境 (TEE) 使用户能够在私有内存区域中运行敏感应用程序。 SGX-PFS 是最先进的 TEE 安全存储解决方案，可确保数据机密性、完整性、新鲜度和一致性 (CIFC)。不幸的是，SGX-PFS 使用 Merkle 哈希树来保护就地持久化数据，但 I/O 性能较差，因此在实践中使用有限。本文提出了 MlsDisk，一种安全虚拟磁盘，采用异地日志记录为 TEE 提供高效的可信块存储。挑战在于日志结构存储中索引和垃圾收集（GC）的复杂性使得安全性难以保证。因此，我们采用分层设计，将索引和GC分解为四层抽象，这有利于CIFC属性的推理。评估表明，在 CIFC 保证下，MlsDisk 在微基准测试上的性能优于 SGX-PFS 7.3×–21.1×，在跟踪驱动的工作负载上优于 SGX-PFS 1.4×–3.6×。

items.title: Here, There and Everywhere: The Past, the Present and the Future of Local Storage in Cloud.
items.abstract: Cloud local storage has been a popular service among many vendors thanks to its near-physical performance and affordable price. In this paper, we revisit the evolution of the cloud local storage at Alibaba Cloud. We systematically analyze and evaluate the motivations, architectures and pros/cons of different methodologies from user space stack to hardware offloading. We also explore the future of local storage including a hybrid solution by integrating Elastic Block Storage to achieve better performance, availability and cost efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 云本地存储因其接近物理的性能和实惠的价格而受到许多供应商的欢迎。在本文中，我们回顾了阿里云云本地存储的演变。我们系统地分析和评估从用户空间堆栈到硬件卸载的不同方法的动机、架构和优缺点。我们还探索本地存储的未来，包括通过集成弹性块存储的混合解决方案，以实现更好的性能、可用​​性和成本效率。

items.title: Cache-Centric Multi-Resource Allocation for Storage Services.
items.abstract: We present HARE, a cache-centric multi-resource allocation algorithm for storage services. HARE introduces a holistic allocation model that captures the demand correlation between cache size and other resources (e.g., I/O, network), and uses a novel two-phase harvest/redistribute method to optimize resource allocation across tenants, maximizing the throughput of each while maintaining fairness. To demonstrate that HARE is widely applicable, we built two systems. The first, HopperKV, is a cloud-native key-value store that modifies Redis to cache data from DynamoDB. The second, BunnyFS, is a microkernel-style local filesystem for NVMe SSDs. Our evaluation shows that HARE is effective for multi-resource allocation in storage. Both systems are scalable and adaptive: HopperKV achieves up to a 1.9x performance improvement, and BunnyFS achieves up to 1.4x.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 HARE，一种用于存储服务的以缓存为中心的多资源分配算法。 HARE 引入了一种整体分配模型，该模型捕获缓存大小与其他资源（例如 I/O、网络）之间的需求相关性，并使用新颖的两阶段收获/重新分配方法来优化租户之间的资源分配，在保持公平性的同时最大化每个租户的吞吐量。为了证明 HARE 的广泛适用性，我们构建了两个系统。第一个是 HopperKV，它是一个云原生键值存储，它修改 Redis 以缓存来自 DynamoDB 的数据。第二个是 BunnyFS，是用于 NVMe SSD 的微内核式本地文件系统。我们的评估表明，HARE 对于存储中的多资源分配是有效的。两个系统都具有可扩展性和自适应性：HopperKV 实现了高达 1.9 倍的性能提升，而 BunnyFS 则实现了高达 1.4 倍的性能提升。

items.title: Cylon: Fast and Accurate Full-System Emulation of CXL-SSDs.
items.abstract: We present Cylon, a fast and extensible full-system emulator for CXL-SSDs built on FEMU. Cylon bridges the gap between closed hardware prototypes and slow software simulators by faithfully reproducing sub-μs cache hits and tens-of-μs misses that fall to NAND through a hybrid execution path that mitigates hypervisor trap overheads. Cylon supports configurable caching policies and provides an application-level interface for hardware-software co-design. Validated against a real CXL-SSD prototype, Cylon accurately models performance across a wide range of applications, from microbenchmarks to full-scale workloads. Our evaluation shows that Cylon reproduces realistic latency distributions, executes unmodified applications at near bare-metal speed, and scales to system-level studies. By combining speed, fidelity, and extensibility, Cylon fills a critical gap for evaluating today’s CXL-SSDs and exploring next-generation architectures that blend CXL-enabled memory and storage semantics.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 Cylon，这是一款快速且可扩展的全系统模拟器，适用于基于 FEMU 构建的 CXL-SSD。 Cylon 通过减少管理程序陷阱开销的混合执行路径忠实地再现落入 NAND 的亚μs 缓存命中和数十μs 未命中，弥合了封闭硬件原型和慢速软件模拟器之间的差距。 Cylon 支持可配置的缓存策略，并为软硬件协同设计提供应用程序级接口。 Cylon 已针对真实的 CXL-SSD 原型进行了验证，可以准确地对从微基准测试到全面工作负载的各种应用程序的性能进行建模。我们的评估表明，Cylon 再现了真实的延迟分布，以接近裸机的速度执行未经修改的应用程序，并扩展到系统级研究。通过将速度、保真度和可扩展性结合在一起，Cylon 填补了评估当今 CXL-SSD 和探索融合支持 CXL 的内存和存储语义的下一代架构的关键空白。

items.title: GPU Checkpoint/Restore Made Fast and Lightweight.
items.abstract: System-level GPU checkpoint/restore (C/R) enables several critical features such as elastic scaling, task switching, and fault tolerance, for modern GPU workloads in a unified and application-transparent manner. However, existing approaches present fundamental limitations: they fail to simultaneously achieve low C/R latency and low overhead imposed on normal GPU execution, while also lacking efficient support for incremental checkpointing. We propose GCR, a GPU checkpoint/restore system that addresses all these limitations simultaneously. GCR employs a hybrid C/R scheme through control/data separation to deliver low C/R latency and negligible overhead imposed on normal GPU execution. To efficiently support incremental checkpointing, GCR introduces shadow execution on the CPU to reduce the overhead of dirty buffer identification, utilizing dirty templates for both lightweight CPU shadow execution and identification at a fine-grained instruction level. Our evaluations demonstrate that GCR reduces GPU checkpointing latency by 72.1% and 63.6% compared to cuda-ckpt (NVIDIA’s official solution) and PhOS (the current state-of-the-art), respectively, and restoration latency by 54.2% and 87.1%, while imposing negligible overhead (less than 1%). GCR also supports efficient incremental checkpointing, which reduces checkpoint sizes by 86.6% and latency by 43.8%.
items.abstract_zh: 系统级 GPU 检查点/恢复 (C/R) 以统一且应用程序透明的方式为现代 GPU 工作负载提供弹性扩展、任务切换和容错等多项关键功能。然而，现有方法存在根本局限性：它们无法同时实现低 C/R 延迟和正常 GPU 执行的低开销，同时也缺乏对增量检查点的有效支持。我们提出了 GCR，一种 GPU 检查点/恢复系统，可以同时解决所有这些限制。 GCR 通过控制/数据分离采用混合 C/R 方案，以提供低 C/R 延迟和对正常 GPU 执行造成的可忽略不计的开销。为了有效支持增量检查点，GCR 在 CPU 上引入了影子执行，以减少脏缓冲区识别的开销，利用脏模板进行轻量级 CPU 影子执行和细粒度指令级别的识别。我们的评估表明，与 cuda-ckpt（NVIDIA 的官方解决方案）和 PhOS（当前最先进的解决方案）相比，GCR 分别将 GPU 检查点延迟减少了 72.1% 和 63.6%，并将恢复延迟减少了 54.2% 和 87.1%，同时带来的开销可以忽略不计（不到 1%）。 GCR 还支持高效的增量检查点，可将检查点大小减少 86.6%，延迟减少 43.8%。

items.title: Rearchitecting Buffered I/O in the Era of High-Bandwidth SSDs.
items.abstract: Buffered I/O via page cache has been prevalently used by applications for decades due to its user-friendliness and high performance. However, the existing buffered I/O architecture fails to effectively utilize high-bandwidth Solid-State Drives (SSDs) caused by 1) costly page caching overused for buffering all incoming writes in the critical path, 2) the limited concurrency of page management, and 3) the high read-before-write penalty for partial-page writes. This paper rearchitects buffered I/O and proposes a write-scrap buffering approach (WSBuffer) to remove the aforementioned shackles of buffered I/O on writes to proactively exploit fast SSDs while retaining all the advantages of buffered I/O on reads. WSBuffer first presents a novel memory-page buffering structure, scrap buffer, to efficiently buffer SSD-I/O unfriendly writes and expensive partial-page writes. WSBuffer further proposes a buffer-minimized data access mechanism to partially buffer small and unaligned parts of user writes via the scrap buffer while directly sending large and aligned parts to underlying SSDs. Finally, WSBuffer devises an opportunistic two-stage dirty-data flushing mechanism and a concurrent page management mechanism to achieve fluent and fast dirty-data flushing. The experimental results show that WSBuffer outperforms Linux file systems of EXT4, F2FS, BTRFS and XFS, as well as the state-of-the-art buffered I/O optimization of ScaleCache by up to 3.91X and 82.80X in throughput and latency respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其用户友好性和高性能，通过页面缓存进行缓冲 I/O 已被应用程序广泛使用数十年。然而，现有的缓冲 I/O 架构无法有效利用高带宽固态硬盘 (SSD)，原因如下：1) 过度使用昂贵的页面缓存来缓冲关键路径中的所有传入写入，2) 页面管理的并发性有限，3) 部分页面写入的先读后写惩罚较高。本文重新架构了缓冲 I/O，并提出了一种写废料缓冲方法 (WSBuffer)，以消除上述写入时缓冲 I/O 的束缚，主动利用快速 SSD，同时保留读取时缓冲 I/O 的所有优势。 WSBuffer 首先提出了一种新颖的内存页面缓冲结构，即废料缓冲区，以有效缓冲 SSD-I/O 不友好的写入和昂贵的部分页面写入。 WSBuffer 进一步提出了一种缓冲区最小化数据访问机制，通过废料缓冲区部分缓冲用户写入的小部分和未对齐部分，同时直接将大部分和对齐部分发送到底层 SSD。最后，WSBuffer设计了机会性两阶段脏数据刷新机制和并发页面管理机制，以实现流畅、快速的脏数据刷新。实验结果表明，WSBuffer 的吞吐量和延迟性能分别优于 Linux 文件系统 EXT4、F2FS、BTRFS 和 XFS，以及最先进的缓冲 I/O 优化 ScaleCache，分别高达 3.91 倍和 82.80 倍。

items.title: ParaSync: Exploiting Fine-Grained Parallelism for Efficient File Synchronization.
items.abstract: File synchronization (sync) based on Content-Defined Chunking (CDC) is gaining increasing importance for data migration over networks owing to its effectiveness in detecting and eliminating duplicate data within synchronized files. CDC-based sync schemes typically comprise three phases: file chunking, chunk matching, and delta reconstruction. Unfortunately, existing sync schemes fail to exploit parallelism inherent in these phases due to two dependencies: a sequential bottleneck in chunking, where checksums are computed only after boundaries are finalized, and rigid client-server stalls that serialize matching and reconstruction. This paper presents ParaSync, a novel CDC-based file sync scheme that breaks these dependencies to exploit fine-grained parallelism. First, ParaSync’s multi-threaded chunking algorithm reduces checksum computation to a lightweight combination step, decoupling it from boundary identification while preserving invariability. Second, ParaSync designs a streaming chunk matching method that removes the all-or-nothing exchange dependency on both the client and the server sides. Finally, ParaSync introduces an efficient absolute-offset-based pipelined delta reconstruction process that maximizes the overlap between network and disk I/O operations. We have done extensive experiments over both WANs and LANs using diverse real-world datasets. The results show that compared to the state-of-the-art file sync schemes, ParaSync achieves up to 7.6× speedup for file chunking and significantly improves the overall sync performance by up to 3.7×, while maintaining a consistent level of network traffic.
items.abstract_zh: 基于内容定义分块 (CDC) 的文件同步 (sync) 对于通过网络进行的数据迁移变得越来越重要，因为它可以有效地检测和消除同步文件中的重复数据。基于 CDC 的同步方案通常包括三个阶段：文件分块、块匹配和增量重建。不幸的是，现有的同步方案由于两个依赖性而无法利用这些阶段固有的并行性：分块中的顺序瓶颈，其中仅在边界确定后才计算校验和，以及串行化匹配和重建的严格的客户端-服务器停顿。本文介绍了 ParaSync，这是一种基于 CDC 的新型文件同步方案，它打破了这些依赖关系以利用细粒度并行性。首先，ParaSync 的多线程分块算法将校验和计算减少为轻量级组合步骤，将其与边界识别解耦，同时保持不变性。其次，ParaSync 设计了一种流式块匹配方法，消除了客户端和服务器端的全有或全无交换依赖。最后，ParaSync 引入了一种高效的基于绝对偏移的流水线增量重建过程，可最大限度地提高网络和磁盘 I/O 操作之间的重叠。我们使用不同的真实数据集在广域网和局域网上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与最先进的文件同步方案相比，ParaSync 的文件分块速度提高了 7.6 倍，整体同步性能显着提高了 3.7 倍，同时保持了一致的网络流量水平。

items.title: An Efficient Cloud Storage Model with Compacted Metadata Management for Performance Monitoring Timeseries Systems.
items.abstract: Cloud-based performance monitoring timeseries systems are emerging due to their flexibility and pay-as-you-go capabilities. However, these systems encounter a major bottleneck in query performance, mainly attributed to the prolonged access latency of cloud storage and metadata redundancy of large number of timeseries. Thus, it is critical to optimize query performance within cloud environment and reduce metadata redundancy. In this paper, we propose CloudTS, which is a novel timeseries data storage model with query optimization for cloud storage. CloudTS separately manages metadata and data, and introduces an efficient global metadata management for both space saving and query speedup. CloudTS also transparently supports the time-partitioned tag-based query model in performance monitoring timeseries systems. For metadata, a global tag dictionary is built to reduce metadata redundancy and a novel timeseries-tag mapping technique with a two-dimension bitmap is designed so the mapping of timeseries and tags can be efficiently accomplished to support tag-based queries. For data, the compressed data chunks are put into objects by timeseries group. We have implemented a fully functional prototype of CloudTS and evaluated it with production timeseries data and synthetic workloads based on Amazon S3. In comparison, Cortex, a cloud-based timeseries system widely adopted by industries, and Apache Parquet and JSON Time Series, two representative cloud storage formats, are utilized in the evaluation. Experimental results show that CloudTS can improve query performance by 1.37x on average compared with Cortex, and outperforms Apache Parquet and JSON Time Series as well.
items.abstract_zh: 基于云的性能监控时间序列系统因其灵活性和即用即付功能而不断涌现。然而，这些系统遇到了查询性能的主要瓶颈，这主要归因于云存储的访问延迟延长和大量时间序列的元数据冗余。因此，优化云环境中的查询性能并减少元数据冗余至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了CloudTS，这是一种新颖的时间序列数据存储模型，具有云存储查询优化功能。 CloudTS 单独管理元数据和数据，并引入高效的全局元数据管理，以节省空间和加快查询速度。 CloudTS 还透明地支持性能监控时间序列系统中基于时间分区标签的查询模型。对于元数据，建立了全局标签字典以减少元数据冗余，并设计了一种新颖的二维位图时间序列标签映射技术，可以有效地完成时间序列和标签的映射以支持基于标签的查询。对于数据，压缩后的数据块按时间序列组放入对象中。我们已经实现了 CloudTS 的功能齐全的原型，并使用生产时间序列数据和基于 Amazon S3 的合成工作负载对其进行了评估。相比之下，评估中使用了业界广泛采用的基于云的时间序列系统Cortex以及两种代表性的云存储格式Apache Parquet和JSON Time Series。实验结果表明，与 Cortex 相比，CloudTS 的查询性能平均提高了 1.37 倍，并且性能也优于 Apache Parquet 和 JSON Time Series。

items.title: SkySync: Accelerating File Synchronization with Collaborative Delta Generation.
items.abstract: File synchronization (sync) is of increasing significance for not only intra-cloud but also inter-cloud applications and services, as cloud computing is evolving into the Sky computing paradigm with the illusion of utility computing on an infrastructure of multiple geographically-distributed clouds. However, existing file sync schemes, mainly including fixed-sized chunking (FSC) based sync and content-defined-chunking (CDC) based sync, heavily rely on complex algorithms for generating the delta data. These algorithms perform costly processing operations including (i) file chunking, (ii) chunk checksum computation, and (iii) chunk searching, which incur high computational overhead thus lowering sync performance. This paper presents SkySync, a novel file sync scheme based on collaborative delta generation. Our insight is that the conventional storage layer has already maintained rich metadata (like checksums and cryptographic digests) for management purpose, e.g., to verify integrity and detect errors. Therefore, we leverage the existent metadata of the storage layer to obtain the chunk checksums with simple adaptation and combination, thus effectively reducing the computational overhead. We further streamline the chunk searching process by reusing checksum data produced during prior computations. We have implemented the FSC-based and CDC-based SkySync schemes by enhancing the communication protocol of the state-of-the-art rsync and dsync, respectively. Evaluation results show that compared to the existing file sync schemes (rsync and dsync), SkySync significantly reduces the computational overhead by up to 89.3% and improves the client and server sync performance by 1.1× ∼2×, while maintaining a consistent level of network traffic.
items.abstract_zh: 文件同步 (sync) 不仅对于云内而且对于云间应用程序和服务都变得越来越重要，因为云计算正在演变成天空计算范式，并在多个地理分布式云的基础设施上进行效用计算。然而，现有的文件同步方案，主要包括基于固定大小分块（FSC）的同步和基于内容定义分块（CDC）的同步，严重依赖复杂的算法来生成增量数据。这些算法执行昂贵的处理操作，包括（i）文件分块，（ii）块校验和计算，以及（iii）块搜索，这会产生高计算开销，从而降低同步性能。本文提出了 SkySync，一种基于协作增量生成的新颖文件同步方案。我们的见解是，传统存储层已经维护了丰富的元数据（如校验和和加密摘要）用于管理目的，例如验证完整性和检测错误。因此，我们利用存储层现有的元数据，通过简单的适配和组合来获取块校验和，从而有效地减少计算开销。我们通过重用先前计算期间产生的校验和数据来进一步简化块搜索过程。我们通过分别增强最先进的 rsync 和 dsync 的通信协议，实现了基于 FSC 和基于 CDC 的 SkySync 方案。评估结果表明，与现有的文件同步方案（rsync和dsync）相比，SkySync显着降低了高达89.3%的计算开销，并将客户端和服务器同步性能提高了1.1×∼2×，同时保持了一致的网络流量水平。

items.title: "Range as a Key" is the Key! Fast and Compact Cloud Block Store Index with RASK.
items.abstract: In cloud block store, indexing is on the critical path of I/O operations and typically resides in memory. With the scaling of users and the emergence of denser storage media, the index has become a primary memory consumer, causing memory strain. Our extensive analysis of production traces reveals that write requests exhibit a strong tendency to target continuous block ranges in cloud storage systems. Thus, compared to current per-block indexing, our insight is that we should directly index block ranges (i.e., range-as-a-key) to save memory . In this paper, we propose RASK, a memory-efficient and high-performance tree-structured index that natively indexes ranges. While range-as-a-key offers the potential to save memory and improve performance, realizing this idea is challenging due to the range overlap and range fragmentation issues. To handle range overlap efficiently, RASK introduces the log-structured leaf, combined with range-tailored search and garbage collection. To reduce range fragmentation, RASK employs range-aware split and merge mechanisms. Our evaluations on four production traces show that RASK reduces memory footprint by up to 98.9% and increases throughput by up to 31.0× compared to ten state-of-the-art indexes.
items.abstract_zh: 在云块存储中，索引位于 I/O 操作的关键路径上，通常驻留在内存中。随着用户规模的扩大和更密集存储介质的出现，索引已成为主要的内存消耗者，导致内存紧张。我们对生产跟踪的广泛分析表明，写入请求表现出以云存储系统中的连续块范围为目标的强烈趋势。因此，与当前的每块索引相比，我们的见解是我们应该直接索引块范围（即范围作为键）以节省内存。在本文中，我们提出了RASK，一种内存高效且高性能的树形结构索引，可以对范围进行本机索引。虽然范围作为键具有节省内存和提高性能的潜力，但由于范围重叠和范围碎片问题，实现这一想法具有挑战性。为了有效地处理范围重叠，RASK 引入了日志结构叶，并结合了范围定制搜索和垃圾收集。为了减少范围碎片，RASK 采用范围感知的拆分和合并机制。我们对四个生产跟踪的评估表明，与十个最先进的索引相比，RASK 将内存占用量减少了高达 98.9%，并将吞吐量提高了高达 31.0 倍。

items.title: SolidAttention: Low-Latency SSD-based Serving on Memory-Constrained PCs.
items.abstract: AI personal computers (AIPCs) enable the local deployment of large language model (LLM) inference, offering enhanced privacy guarantees and customizable serving. However, such deployments are constrained by limited memory capacity, primarily due to the substantial key-value (KV) cache overhead. This paper introduces SolidAttention, an LLM inference engine which addresses these limitations through a tight co-design of dynamic attention sparsity algorithms and SSD-based storage management. Specifically, to maximize SSD bandwidth utilization, SolidAttention consolidates multiple KV pairs into coarse-grained blocks and implements speculative prefetching mechanisms that exploit temporal locality in sparse attention. By fine-grained orchestration of computation and I/O operations while reusing synchronization points, SolidAttention further minimizes SSD-induced blocking latency. With a 128k-token context, SolidAttention improves the inference speed by up to 3.1× and reduces the KV cache memory footprint by up to 98% without compromising inference accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能个人计算机 (AIPC) 支持本地部署大语言模型 (LLM) 推理，提供增强的隐私保证和可定制的服务。然而，此类部署受到内存容量有限的限制，这主要是由于大量的键值 (KV) 缓存开销。本文介绍了 SolidAttention，这是一种 LLM 推理引擎，它通过动态注意力稀疏算法和基于 SSD 的存储管理的紧密协同设计来解决这些限制。具体来说，为了最大限度地提高 SSD 带宽利用率，SolidAttention 将多个 KV 对合并为粗粒度块，并实现利用稀疏注意力中的时间局部性的推测预取机制。通过在重用同步点的同时细粒度地编排计算和 I/O 操作，SolidAttention 进一步最大限度地减少了 SSD 引起的阻塞延迟。在 128k-token 上下文中，SolidAttention 将推理速度提高了 3.1 倍，并将 KV 缓存占用空间减少了 98%，而不会影响推理精度。

items.title: 24th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies, FAST 2026, Santa Clara, CA, USA, February 24-26, 2026
items.abstract: 24th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '26), February 24–26, 2026, Hyatt Regency Santa Clara, Santa Clara, CA, USA. FAST brings together storage-system researchers and practitioners to explore new directions in the design, implementation, evaluation, and deployment of storage systems.
items.abstract_zh: 第 24 届 USENIX 文件和存储技术会议 (FAST '26)，2026 年 2 月 24 日至 26 日，美国加利福尼亚州圣克拉拉圣克拉拉凯悦酒店。 FAST 将存储系统研究人员和从业者聚集在一起，探索存储系统设计、实施、评估和部署的新方向。
